method-option.email-description: Master email marketing with fully customized templates
method-option.notification-description: Send automated notifications to your customers

step.broadcast-recipients-description: Segment who's going to receive this broadcast
step.broadcast-config-description: Configure, Write and Compose your broadcast
step.method-not-found: Method not found, Try to refresh the page

delete-action.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the {{count}} selected broadcast?

set-live.confirm: Are you sure you want to set this broadcast live?

verified-email.no-emails-found: No verified emails found. You can add by typing an email address.
verified-email.added-description: Your email has been added! Please check your inbox for confirmation
verified-email.remove-confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this email?

log.no-traces-description: Traces will appear here once the broadcast starts sending.

detail-stat.total-description: The cumulative count of all email messages processed during this broadcast.
detail-stat.send-description: The handoff to Amazon SES was successful and delivery is now being attempted.
detail-stat.delivery-description: The email was successfully accepted by the recipient's incoming mail server.
detail-stat.open-description: The recipient viewed the message content within their specific email client.
detail-stat.click-description: The recipient interacted with one or more tracked hyperlinks in the email.
detail-stat.complaint-description: The recipient received the email but manually flagged the message as spam.
detail-stat.bounce-description: The recipient's mail server permanently rejected the message delivery attempt.
detail-stat.renderingfailure-description: The email was not sent due to a technical error within the template syntax.
detail-stat.reject-description: The email was scanned by Amazon SES, found to be a risk, and blocked.
